query:
-- Get all billing items for these customers to understand the revenue context
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0214','C0003','C0235','C0091','C0044','C0271','C2893')
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.customerExternalId
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, ABS(bi.lineAmount) DESC;

-- Get all billing items for these customers to understand the revenue context
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0214','C0003','C0235','C0091','C0044','C0271','C2893')
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.customerExternalId
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, ABS(bi.lineAmount) DESC;
